goal: alright create a tkinter calculator app that works well with very large numbers

92d3161e.name: Sprint Goal
92d3161e.description: alright create a tkinter calculator app that works well with very large numbers

7afbc494.name: BigIntEngine
7afbc494.description: NON-ATOMIC: This sub-concern covers the core mathematical logic for high-precision arithmetic. It needs further splitting to define specific interface protocols for big-integer operations versus standard float behaviors before implementation.

ab51dd07.name: DisplayBuffer
ab51dd07.description: NON-ATOMIC: This sub-concern covers the visual representation and string formatting of arbitrarily large numbers in the UI. It needs further splitting to separate formatting logic from the specific tkinter text widget interaction.

1c720397.name: InputController
1c720397.description: NON-ATOMIC: This sub-concern covers event handling for button clicks and keyboard input processing. It needs further splitting to define the input validation schema and command pattern implementation for the calculator interface.

91d6aeb6.name: MainEntry
91d6aeb6.description: NON-ATOMIC: This sub-concern covers application orchestration, window lifecycle management, and dependency injection for the UI and logic layers. It needs further splitting to finalize the main loop configuration and resource cleanup processes.

45a73825.name: NumberFormatter
45a73825.description: ATOMIC: This module provides pure utility functions to format large integers or decimals into display-ready strings with truncation or scientific notation logic. Contains: format_for_display(value: str, max_chars: int) -> str. State: No internal state, purely functional. Imports: None. Consumed by DisplayBuffer. This file is atomic as it provides a single static transformation utility.

5252f64e.name: DisplayBufferState
5252f64e.description: ATOMIC: This module maintains the current string state of the calculator display and handles text updates for the Tkinter UI. Contains class DisplayState with: __init__(self, initial_value: str = '0') -> None, update_text(self, new_val: str) -> None, get_text(self) -> str, clear(self) -> None. State: self._buffer: str. Imports: None. Consumed by calculator_ui.py. This file is atomic as it strictly manages the buffer state for the GUI.

ab859225.name: AppBootstrap
ab859225.description: NON-ATOMIC: This sub-concern covers the entry point, dependency wiring, and window lifecycle orchestration. It needs splitting into specific orchestration logic and the main loop definition.

62a4c660.name: BigIntEngine
62a4c660.description: NON-ATOMIC: This sub-concern covers the mathematical operations for high-precision arithmetic. It needs splitting into arithmetic primitives and validation logic.

640cc038.name: DisplayBuffer
640cc038.description: ATOMIC: This file manages the visual state of the calculator display and input sanitization. Contains class DisplayBuffer with: __init__(self, master: tk.Tk) -> None, update_text(self, new_val: str) -> None, clear(self) -> None, and get_current_input(self) -> str. Holds self.display_widget: tk.Entry, self.current_text: str. Imports tkinter as tk. Consumed by main.py.

ea35a905.name: ButtonGrid
ea35a905.description: NON-ATOMIC: This sub-concern covers the layout and event binding for the numerical keypad. Needs splitting into grid configuration and event-handling delegates.

86fac79e.name: BigIntValidator
86fac79e.description: ATOMIC: Validates string inputs to ensure they are compatible with high-precision arithmetic. Contains class InputValidator with: __init__(self) -> None, validate(self, input_str: str) -> bool. No module-level functions. State: None. Imports: typing. Consumed by calculation_engine.py.

ab514627.name: BigIntOperations
ab514627.description: ATOMIC: Performs high-precision arithmetic operations on large integers. Contains class BigMath with: __init__(self) -> None, add(self, a: str, b: str) -> str, subtract(self, a: str, b: str) -> str, multiply(self, a: str, b: str) -> str, divide(self, a: str, b: str) -> str. State: None. Imports: None. Consumed by controller.py.

809f993e.name: BigIntFormatter
809f993e.description: ATOMIC: Formats raw large integer strings for display in the UI. Contains class OutputFormatter with: __init__(self, precision: int) -> None, format_display(self, value: str) -> str. State: self.precision: int. Imports: None. Consumed by ui/display.py.

c0085662.name: InputValidator
c0085662.description: ATOMIC: Validates raw string input for calculator safety and format before processing. Contains class InputValidator with: __init__(self) -> None, validate_digit(self, char: str) -> bool, validate_operator(self, op: str) -> bool, is_expression_valid(self, expression: str) -> bool. State: Holds self._allowed_operators: set[str]. Consumed by InputController.py.

15ae14e7.name: CommandDispatcher
15ae14e7.description: ATOMIC: Implements the command pattern to execute calculator operations via decoupled logic. Contains class CommandDispatcher with: __init__(self, engine: Any) -> None, execute(self, cmd_type: str, *args: str) -> str. State: Holds self._engine: Any. Consumed by InputController.py and main.py.

5fe504bb.name: KeyEventHandler
5fe504bb.description: ATOMIC: Bridges tkinter keyboard events to application commands. Contains class KeyEventHandler with: __init__(self, root: Any, dispatcher: CommandDispatcher) -> None, handle_keypress(self, event: Any) -> None. State: Holds self.dispatcher: CommandDispatcher. Consumed by main.py.

4823f4ca.name: BigIntArithmetic
4823f4ca.description: ATOMIC: This file handles high-precision mathematical operations using Python's native arbitrary-precision integer support. Contains class BigIntProcessor with: __init__(self) -> None, add(self, a: int, b: int) -> int, subtract(self, a: int, b: int) -> int, multiply(self, a: int, b: int) -> int, divide(self, a: int, b: int) -> float. Holds self.precision_limit: int. Imports nothing from the project. Consumed by calculator_controller.py.

d87d8c32.name: BigIntValidation
d87d8c32.description: ATOMIC: This file validates input strings to ensure they represent valid high-precision numbers. Contains class InputValidator with: __init__(self) -> None, is_valid_number(self, val: str) -> bool, sanitize(self, val: str) -> str. Module-level function: format_large_number(val: int) -> str. Holds self.max_digits: int = 10000. Imports nothing from the project. Consumed by calculator_ui.py and calculator_controller.py.

6c075ea6.name: WindowOrchestrator
6c075ea6.description: ATOMIC: Defines the primary application window lifecycle and geometry configuration. Contains class CalcWindow with: __init__(self, title: str, geometry: str) -> None, setup_grid(self) -> None, run(self) -> None. Holds self.root: tk.Tk, self.title: str. Imports tkinter as tk. Consumed by main.py.

c13e6460.name: DependencyWiring
c13e6460.description: ATOMIC: Defines the dependency injection container and startup registry. Contains class AppContext with: __init__(self) -> None, get_engine(self) -> CalculationEngine, get_ui(self) -> CalcWindow. Holds self._engine: CalculationEngine, self._window: CalcWindow. Imports CalculationEngine from src/logic/engine.py. Consumed by main.py.

c58731eb.name: EntryPoint
c58731eb.description: ATOMIC: Manages the application bootstrap and main loop invocation. Contains module-level function main() -> None. No internal state. Imports AppContext from src/core/container.py and CalcWindow from src/ui/window.py. Entry point for the entire application.

885722e3.name: GridConfiguration
885722e3.description: ATOMIC: This file defines the layout structure and styling for the calculator buttons. It contains class ButtonLayoutManager with: __init__(self, parent: tk.Widget) -> None, create_grid(self, command_callback: Callable[[str], None]) -> None, get_button_style(self) -> dict[str, Any]. Holds self.parent: tk.Widget, self.buttons: dict[str, tk.Button]. Imports tkinter as tk and typing.Callable. Consumed by main.py and app_window.py.

f1e1f45c.name: EventHandlingDelegates
f1e1f45c.description: ATOMIC: This file manages the routing of button clicks to calculation logic. It contains class ButtonEventHandler with: __init__(self, display_update_func: Callable[[str], None]) -> None, handle_click(self, char: str) -> None, clear_display(self) -> None. Holds self.display_update_func: Callable[[str], None]. Imports typing.Callable. Consumed by main.py and grid_configuration.py.
